message:
fix(atc-labeling): set explicit timestamps in no-action labeling test to satisfy attribution window

The test_skipped_no_action_label_success test was relying on default
timestamp values that happened to fall within the attribution window.
After the window-expiry check was restructured, the defaults could
fall outside valid bounds. This fix sets explicit timestamps:

- now_micros = 100s (well within the 5-minute NoAction window)
- observed_ts_micros = 50s (past the 30s minimum delay for NoAction)

This ensures the test validates labeling logic rather than accidentally
passing or failing due to timestamp arithmetic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
